rationale: The cited study examines cross-retailer promotion timing (in-phase vs. out-of-phase) and its effects on manufacturer/retailer performance in CPG categories, which is closely related to the citing paper’s intrayear demand-cycle analysis of advertising and pricing effectiveness in CPG markets. That overlap indicates the citation could be a substantive prior mechanism/comparison source rather than a purely generic background mention. Even though the raw match evidence is only a DOI-level reference entry, the conceptual proximity is strong enough to keep.
